project.name: EDS Platform
project.tagline: Unified logistics platform for Express Delivery Sweden
project.description: Replacing manual email-based quoting (30-60 min per quote across 6+ systems) with a unified digital platform powered by AI. At its core is EDS Search — an engine that instantly pulls rates, parses emails, auto-generates carrier quotes, and presents multi-option comparisons.

phases.name: Core Foundation + Email RFQ
phases.goal: Replace email-based quoting with EDS Search + Email RFQ
highlights: Go backend with 30+ REST API endpoints
React 19 frontend with full RFQ workflow
End-to-end verified with real Front.com account
remaining: EDS Search with Agreed Rates (carrier price lists + Sendify API)

phases.name: Opter Integration + Route of the North
phases.goal: Connect to Opter (90% of orders) + RoN market-ready by June 1
highlights: RoN data model: linehauls, hubs, legs, contracts
Composite pricing engine with lead time calculation
RoN in EDS Search: dedicated vs co-load comparison

phases.name: RoN Test + Logistaas + Data
phases.goal: Live RoN in June, build sea/air integration + analytics
highlights: June: RoN test month with real customers
DBT on MySQL (stepping stone to Snowflake)

phases.name: Intelligence + Scale
phases.goal: Full intelligence layer, dynamic pricing, portals

items.text: Auth — dual-mode: dev stub + Zitadel OIDC JWT
Dual-mode auth (dev login / Zitadel OIDC PKCE)
Inbound email detail with parsed data

deliverables.title: Platform Merge + CI/CD
deliverables.description: Full-stack monorepo: Go backend + React frontend + Terraform infra, unified CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, end-to-end Zitadel OIDC verified

deliverables.title: Data Quality + Time Windows
deliverables.description: Incomplete data resolver with AI follow-up emails, required fields validation, RFQ time windows for load/delivery scheduling

deliverables.title: Auth + Full Email RFQ + API Docs
deliverables.description: Complete dual-mode auth, RBAC, 5-step Email RFQ workflow, OpenAPI 3.0 spec, Swagger UI, React frontend with login, dashboard, RFQ management

deliverables.title: Booking System + Real Data + Frontend
deliverables.description: Full booking lifecycle, 69 customers and 701 carriers seeded from Opter, React frontend with inbound detail, booking creation

deliverables.title: Repository + Inbound Email Parsing
deliverables.description: Go backend with Front.com webhook integration, Claude AI email parser, Docker Compose local dev, cross-repo knowledge bridge

process.methodology: AI-first compressed workflow — build working software fast, iterate on real code, use agents for backend logic and refactoring. 10 iterations in an hour, not 10 in a month.

layers.name: Strategic
layers.description: Weekly syncs + phase gate reviews with EDS stakeholders. Architectural decisions documented as ADRs.

layers.name: Delivery
layers.description: 2-week sprints: plan, build, demo, retro. Working software over documentation.

layers.name: AI-First Development
layers.description: Claude Code for backend + domain analysis, rapid iteration on real code, automated testing and validation.

meetings.name: Architecture Sync
meetings.purpose: Review technical decisions, unblock implementation, align on architecture

meetings.name: EDS Stakeholder Sync
meetings.purpose: Progress update, scope decisions, priority alignment, feedback

meetings.name: Sprint Demo
meetings.purpose: Live demo of completed features, stakeholder feedback, sprint retrospective

meetings.name: Phase Gate Review
meetings.participants: Full team + EDS leadership + Fredrik Edeland
meetings.purpose: Formal review of phase deliverables, go/no-go for next phase, budget and timeline check
